taxonomy.failure_mode: Symbol candidate localization and operating-point instability
evidence: P140 improves symbol F1 to 0.498955 with inflation 1.290271, but center remains 0.676635 and absolute F1 is below 0.95.
P136 found no center>=0.90 operating point from naive v28 threshold/top-k.
taxonomy.paper_use: Positive bounded operating-point rescue plus remaining limitation.
taxonomy.future_work: Dedicated detector/listwise selection with localization-aware loss and validation on full locked set.

evidence: P141 high-center variant reaches center 0.922099 but inflation 4.977742 and F1 0.266489.
P137 room pixel recall exceeds 0.95 but precision/F1 are below 0.95.
taxonomy.paper_use: Diagnostic evidence: room masks have recall-rich signal but current box extraction overproduces.
taxonomy.future_work: Structured room merging, contour regularization, polygon reconstruction, and inflation-aware box selection.

taxonomy.paper_use: Main negative evidence or appendix limitation; do not claim text readiness.
taxonomy.future_work: OCR-aware branch, text-region crops, external OCR integration, or separate annotation protocol.

evidence: P107 symbol target-level F1 is 0.046862 despite P105 symbol pixel F1 0.210434.
taxonomy.paper_use: Negative evidence showing dense mask signal does not convert to object boxes.
taxonomy.future_work: Object-centric symbol detector or symbol proposal/refiner trained at box level.

evidence: Opening/window pixel F1 remain low in P105.
taxonomy.paper_use: Appendix diagnostic unless paper needs a full failure taxonomy.
taxonomy.future_work: Separate line/edge topology model and raster-to-vector wall/opening reconstruction.

evidence: P143 found zero all-gate policies in P124 top rows.
Low-inflation selector rows fail center; center-passing rows fail inflation.
taxonomy.paper_use: Negative evidence for independent selector/budget layer.
taxonomy.future_work: Structured global optimization with page/label budgets and spatial constraints.

evidence: P142 best model-output contains-symbol F1 is only 0.036225.
taxonomy.paper_use: Use as claim-boundary evidence: relation logic works under expected-json but runtime graph quality remains blocked by upstream visual errors.
taxonomy.future_work: Replay relation policy after improved symbol/room branches and evaluate on model-output graphs.

paper_recommendation: Keep P140 symbol rescue as bounded positive. Keep P141/P142/P143 and image-only text/symbol/boundary as explicit negative evidence. Use this taxonomy to update v0.4 and avoid hiding failures.
